description: Schema introspection — verify column and index were created

column_checks.note: NEW column added by migration — confirmed present

index_checks.note: NEW unique index added by migration — confirmed present

raw_psql_output:
Table "public.users"
    Column     |            Type             | Nullable |           Default
---------------+-----------------------------+----------+------------------------------
 id            | integer                     | not null | nextval('users_id_seq'::regclass)
 email         | character varying(255)      | not null |
 name          | character varying(255)      |          |
 created_at    | timestamp with time zone    |          | now()
 last_login_at | timestamp with time zone    |          |
Indexes:
    "users_pkey" PRIMARY KEY, btree (id)
    "users_email_unique" UNIQUE, btree (email)
observation: Schema introspection confirms: (1) last_login_at column exists with type 'timestamp with time zone' and nullable=true; (2) users_email_unique UNIQUE index exists on the email column. Both additions are present in the live schema.
